debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2

M : Set β
P : WList α β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
h : @Graph.IsAugPath α β M G hM P
⊢ V(G, M) ⊆ V(G, symmDiff M P.edgeSet)

intro x hx
  by_contra hx'
  have hmax : G.IsMaxMatching M := hM.isMaxMatching_of_vertex_subset (by
    intro v hv
    by_contra hv'
    exact hx' ⟨e, ⟨hv, hv'⟩⟩)
  have haug : G.IsMatching (M ∆ E(P)) := h.augment
  have hle := hmax.max (M ∆ E(P)) haug
  have hlt : M.encard < (M ∆ E(P)).encard := by
    simpa [Nat.lt_iff_le_and_ne] using (h.augment_encard_lt : M.encard < (M ∆ E(P)).encard)
  exact (not_lt_of_ge hle) hlt
